title: engagement.yaml
description: Contract for the per engagement configuration file at the engagement repo root. Parsed by engine/configLoader.py, which supports a YAML subset: two space indentation, nested maps, block lists, inline lists, scalar strings, numbers, booleans and dates — no anchors, no multiline scalars.

reviewer.description: The reviewing organisation, normally SAS Asset Management.

start.description: Engagement start date, ISO 8601 (YYYY-MM-DD) at rest, rendered DD/MM/YYYY.

interviewCeiling.description: Budget ceiling for the interview roster.

pluginVersion.description: Plugin version pinned at init, e.g. 1.0.0. The engagement runs against this version for its whole life unless deliberately upgraded.

pack.description: Pack id, resolved against the engagement's local packs/<id>/ overlay first, then the plugin's packs/<id>/.

scale.description: Must equal the pack's scale.id, e.g. iam-0-5.

aggregationWeights.description: Optional override of the pack's defaultWeights.

directOverIndirect.description: Weight multiplier for Direct over Indirect evidence.

highOverLow.description: Weight multiplier for High over Medium confidence; Low weighs the reciprocal.

rounding.description: Rounding rule for final scores: floor unless the fractional part is strictly greater than 0.7, in which case ceil. Only supported value.

complianceMatrix.description: Optional override of the pack's complianceMatrix flag. When absent the pack value applies (engine/configLoader.py resolveComplianceMatrix).

logo.description: Logo identifier for the deliverable surfaces.

bannedPhrasings.description: Assessor lane guardrails enforced by the proseRules hook.

sovereignty.description: Evidence never leaves the engagement repo.

api.description: Asserts the Claude API runs under zero data retention and no training terms.

captureTool.description: Transcript capture source; defaults to granola.

benchmark.description: Peer benchmarking mode. When benchmark.json is absent the peerPercentile plot is omitted, never faked.
